# Citation Agent

Citation-paying research agent with Circle Arc nanopayments and creator royalties.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/
Landing page and seller sign-in for the nanopayments dashboard.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/dashboard
Seller dashboard: live payments, creator earnings, agent reputation, and withdrawals.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/api/premium/citation/index
Free citation catalog for research agents to discover paywalled sources.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/api/premium/citation?id=trust-infrastructure
Paid citation endpoint (x402). Agents pay per citation; 70% royalty attributed to creators.

https://citation-agent.vercel.app/api/premium/quote
Baseline x402 quote endpoint from the Arc nanopayments starter.
